Midoriyama Devices K.K. — Operational Incident Report (JP) — 2026-05-28
On 2026-05-25, vendor Hoshizora Data Services G.K. reported a short-lived access control misconfiguration in the board/exec document portal.
The exposed folder contained training materials: board pack templates, acquisition workflow checklists, and HR onboarding form samples.
One scanned HR form inadvertently contained an actual 個人番号 (My Number): 7531-6420-1984; we are treating this as APPI personal data.
All other fields were samples: 氏名: ______, 住所: [Hanagawa-ken Nishisaka-shi 1-2-3], 部署: ______, 電話: 0120-777-000 (public helpline), メール: hr@midori-devices.jp (role mailbox).
Company/tax identifiers present were non-production: 法人番号 0000000000000 (test), 登録番号 T0000000000000 (dummy), 請求先コード: C-TEST-001.
Travel and banking fields were also placeholders: 旅券番号 AA0000000 (template), 支店コード 000, 口座番号 000-0000000 (sample only).
The M&A references were to the already-announced share acquisition of Hinode Analytics K.K., disclosed on 2026-04-30 via KPX Growth and our website.
Accordingly, no undisclosed enumerated material facts or tender-offer (TOB) facts under the FIEA were present in the exposed materials.
The misconfiguration allowed read-only access from a restricted test IP range for approximately 46 minutes; no downloads were logged by external addresses.
We have notified employees via the intranet and the public inquiry line at 0120-555-555; do not email personal documents in response to this notice.
A voluntary incident notice will be filed with the Kanto Markets Supervision Office, and a courtesy update sent to listings@kpx-growth.example.jp (exchange liaison mailbox).
The Board Risk Committee met on 2026-05-26 and determined the overall PII exposure to be low, subject to APPI handling of the single 個人番号 image.
Remediation completed: vendor key rotation, deletion of sample files, replacement of dummy identifiers with clearly marked “TRAINING USE ONLY” watermarks.
Local government and address placeholders included LG-999999 (fictional ward code) and 〒000-0000 Hanagawa-ken Nishisaka-shi Aza Ume 1-2-3; these are not real locations.
Securities operations content (e.g., draft share transfer forms and settlement workflows) contained only blank form labels and public process descriptions.
No payroll files, payables accounts, or passport scans beyond placeholders were exposed, and no changes to shareholdings or control were effected.
